# HUMMBL MCP Server — llms.txt
# AI-readable index of the HUMMBL MCP Server.
# Give Claude access to 120 validated mental models via Model Context Protocol. Last updated: 2026-06-14.
#
# Query API: LLMs can parse this file to understand MCP server capabilities
# Installation: npm install -g @hummbl/mcp-server
# Repository: https://github.com/hummbl-dev/mcp-server
# Documentation: https://hummbl.io/docs/mcp-server

## Overview

The HUMMBL MCP Server exposes 120 validated mental models via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). This allows Claude and other AI assistants to access structured cognitive frameworks for better analysis and decision-making.

## Key Documents

- README.md: Installation and usage guide
- docs/REPO_HEALTH.md: Repository health contract and validation
- src/index.ts: Main MCP server entry point
- src/tools/: All available MCP tools

## Tools Available

- base120_query: Query the Base120 mental model database
- base120_export: Export mental models to various formats
- base120_methodology: Access methodological frameworks
- base120_workflows: Access structured problem-solving workflows

## Quick Start

```bash
npm install -g @hummbl/mcp-server
hummbl-mcp
```

## Contact

- Issues: https://github.com/hummbl-dev/mcp-server/issues
- Website: https://hummbl.io
